reviews.review_description:
If you want something like this, but more content, get frenzy vr.

Bugs/missing features:
You cannot use your bare hands to destroy things and sometimes broken pieces will float even if they are disconnected from anything else, mostly noticeable with the 2 sinks and 1 urinal map.

Reset system:
Also the loading system is not great, after clicking reset the game loads every single map behind the scenes and puts you back to home, this causes a huge lag spike, try to only load the home area and then load the map selected afterwards.
There are 2 reset buttons but they both bring you home, I'm sure this one is being worked on but I'll put it out there still, make one reset button load the current map and the other sends you home.

Thanks for reading.

Please add sound for the destruction. There is only music which I turn off.

And please add a reset button that resets the target. At the moment the reset button brings you back to main menu.

Physics is not bad. But at some things (a wood table for example) there are parts that cant be destructed. They just stand hanging in the air.
The game needs sound the physics are good but it gets boring fast
It’s so boring and the hammer barely moves and when you get something it floats like wtf

developer_response.body: Hey there, This experience is intended as a simple destruction simulation rather than a full game and was developed by one solo dev two years ago. I understand it may not be for everyone, but one-star reviews can greatly impact experimental apps like this. If you have suggestions for improvements or features, I’d love to hear them. Your input can help shape future updates!”  I will reach out through meta app

reviews.review_title: Best way get rid of your anger
reviews.review_description: Really fun to destroy should at more to it like different levels
Good destruction simulator, but please add more sound when breaking things and maybe more haptic feedback too.
You've got something decent here. Hope you keep adding to it in future.
This is very fun but I want like a whole map and more guns like bone lab but I still love still fell while playing it plus more weapons I love it still

This game should not cost anything for the amount of gameplay there is. I was expecting much more but there is like 20 ish objects you can break and they all are just broken within like 5 hits. It wasn’t enough game to cost anything. I don’t recommend buying it. It was entertaining for like 15 minutes.

reviews.review_title: really good for a cheap game
reviews.review_description:
Its a really fun game with like 20+ levels! also it you dont want the sledgehammer you can use guns, bottles and THORS FREAKING HAMMER! and this game is pretty cheap so i suggest getting it.
i would rate 5.5 stars if i could
Good impact and easy to use.  Nice job of having different options. Please keep up the good work in developing games
sutch a good game mr dev pls add explosives and bigger things to break
It’s a good idea for a game but if you can add things like reset map and more realistic breaking or whole maps were everything’s destructible the game would be a lot better

developer_response.body: Those would be great to implement,  sorry for the lack up content and updates, the development has been put on hold for sometime since I have put all of my time into addressing updates and concerns of the newer mixed reality games released due to the demands. I am really hoping I can get a coder to help me out with this to add the features requested.

reviews.review_description: It is good but needs more improvement (i know that's why it is on applab) but I think that the reset loading time is unnecessary. Also the breaking physics are not the best they are to easy to break and some of the objects stay in the air after you break them
I don't hear breaking sounds all there is, is a breaking sound when falling but games good please add more stuff to hit stuff with either all really good for 5 buck

Just downloaded this game and had a lot of fun playing it. The physics are good and there are plenty of objects to break! Might have missed it but it would be cool to be able to place more objects in one round. The space background is really cool and the game is very visually pleasing!

...it's not right. Should be free, at least for now.

Sell some ad space in-game to make your money for now instead. I'm sure you could get those tools sponsored, or slap a digital billboard somewhere.
it suck i got bored of it in like 2 minutes
